name: Tabs
summary: A tab navigation component with animated background pill that moves selected tab to top with spring transitions.
detailedDescription: Tabs creates an interactive tab navigation system where clicking a tab animates it to the front position while displaying associated content below. The component maintains two state arrays: the original propTabs and a mutable tabs array where the selected tab moves to index 0. When a tab is clicked, it's spliced from its position and unshifted to the front, triggering a re-render. A motion.div with layoutId='clickedbutton' creates a shared layout animation - the gray background pill smoothly transitions between tab positions using a spring animation (bounce: 0.3, duration: 0.6). The active tab's value determines which content displays in the FadeInDiv below. Tabs are styled as rounded-full buttons with relative positioning, supporting custom className props for container, active tab, individual tabs, and content areas. The component uses 3D transform-style for potential depth effects and handles horizontal scrolling with hidden scrollbars. Content fades in/out based on active state, with hover detection for potential additional effects. This creates a polished tab experience ideal for content organization, feature comparisons, or multi-view interfaces.
purpose: Organize content into switchable tabbed views
Animate selected tab with shared layout transitions
behavior: Moves clicked tab to first position in array
Animates background pill between tab positions
Updates active tab state on selection
Displays corresponding content for active tab
Uses spring physics for smooth transitions
Tracks hover state for potential effects
visualCharacteristics: Rounded pill background for active tab
recommendations: Good fit for dashboards, admin panels, and data-dense application layouts.
Suitable for performance-sensitive pages that still need polished visuals.
Combine with hero and feature sections to establish clear top-level page flow.
